name: Pollo Alla Cleopatra (Chicken Breasts with Capers)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil and butter in a large frying pan.
2. Dredge the chicken in the flour and sauté for 3 minutes on each side.
3. Add the green onions, tarragon, capers, and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Pour in the white wine, stock, brandy, and heavy cream.
5. Simmer until reduced by about half, then add the white wine and beef stock, reducing slightly.
6. Add the heavy cream and return the chicken to the pan; simmer for 5 more minutes.
7. Season with salt and pepper.
8. Serve over rice or pasta with chopped parsley on top.
